description_long: This house features a blend of modern and traditional architectural elements, with a prominent brick facade and a combination of flat and gable roofs. The front entryway is defined by a small porch with steps leading up to a single main door, flanked by arched windows and decorative stonework. The structure includes multiple stories, with a rooftop area that appears to have a helipad or terrace, and a large balcony supported by columns at the rear. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, several trees, and a driveway leading to a garage. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the exterior, providing ample natural light. The overall design suggests a spacious, upscale suburban residence with both private and social outdoor spaces.
description: A spacious, upscale house with a mix of brick and modern elements, featuring a flat and gable roof, large windows, a front porch, and a rooftop terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, arched windows, driveway, and a mix of brick and modern facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and additional trees, with the rooftop terrace and helipad visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large balcony supported by columns, extensive windows, and a tree on the left side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable roof section, rear balcony, and more of the landscaped yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door with steps, small porch, arched windows, and decorative stonework
